Day advanced to 2026-03-27.
9,367 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-26 -> 2026-03-27)

- "Which armed group will say it launched attacks in the area hours before a missile strike on a southern Israeli city on March 28, 2026?" → Houthis
- "Which app will a suspect say was used to recruit him for the attempted Paris bank bombing by March 31, 2026?" → Snapchat
- "Which company will say one of its sites in Abu Dhabi suffered significant damage after Iranian missile and drone strikes, by 29 March 2026?" → Emirates Global Aluminium
- "What town in southern Lebanon will be named as the site of the strike that will kill three Lebanese journalists, by March 2026?" → Jezzine

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 108 (327 resolved, 3 active)
- accuracy: 4.5% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -467.76
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
